output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?player(COUNT(?match) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P178 wd:Q5027 ; wdt:P1064 ?home ; wdt:P1065 ?away .
  FILTER(((?home = wd:Q5442 && ?away = wd:Q7021) ||(?home = wd:Q7021 && ?away = wd:Q5442)))
  .
  ?match wdt:P2245 ?player .
}
GROUP BY ?player
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
